concerns.text: FR-008 and US1-Acceptance-3 require the Generalization Set to have 'distinct logical structures' (premises/operators) from training. T013 only mentions 'unique structures' generically. There is no explicit task to implement the logic that generates these distinct structures (e.g., new operator sets or premise combinations) to satisfy the 'distinct logical structures' mandate of FR-008.

FR-009 requires the system to 'filter out inconsistent traces before distillation' and validate trace entropy. While T022 computes trace entropy and T022-INT integrates the filter, there is no explicit task to generate the 'validation report' or log the specific 'count of filtered samples' required to prove FR-009 compliance to a reviewer (as noted in the analyze report).

SC-001 and SC-002 require measuring convergence speed and accuracy against null hypotheses. T033 generates 'StatisticalResult' records, but there is no explicit task to output the 'final statistical report' containing the specific p-values and F-statistics as a distinct artifact (e.g., a JSON summary or report section) separate from the code logic, as required to satisfy the 'Measurable Outcomes' of the success criteria.

Constitution Principle I (Reproducibility) requires seeds to be pinned and verified. T006 sets up configuration for seeds, but there is no explicit task to 'run a reproducibility verification check' (re-running the generator with the same seed to confirm identical output checksums) as part of the setup or CI pipeline, leaving the 'Reproducibility' principle unverified by a task.

T015-FAIL is named 'Implement fail-fast logic... to halt pipeline execution'. The description is clear, but the tag 'T015-FAIL' is non-standard and might be confused with a test failure rather than a task ID. Consider renaming to 'T015-ENFORCE' or similar for clarity, though the task itself covers the requirement.
